caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses, wearing a grey cardigan over a floral top, sits at a white crafting table in a well-equipped studio. Behind her, shelving units hold colorful ink pads and tools, with a sign reading "MERRI" and "CHRI STOSS" visible. To her right is a black desk lamp and a set of shears hanging on a wall. She is focused on a small white object in her hands, manipulating it over a light blue piece of paper on the table. Across the sequence, she maintains a focused expression, speaking while she works. As time progresses, she shifts her gaze slightly and continues to handle the small white object, eventually bringing it closer to the paper. A black smartwatch is visible on her left wrist as she works with her hands in front of her.
